SPECIAL 2: Autophagia: At turn start, may deal 1 piercing damage to self, to generate a corpse in an adjacent space.
SPECIAL 3: Hunch: May use corpses as cover.

TRAIT 1: Flight: Ignores adverse terrain and elevation attack and movement penalties.
ABILITY 1: Regurgitate: Range 2-4. Effect: Splash (target): Create a corpse in the area for every unit in the area, up to three times, then mutate.
ABILITY 2: Sin Eater: Attack, Range 2-4. On hit: 1 damage. Effect: Steal a positive token from target. If target has no positive tokens, gain 1 strength instead of stealing a token. Spare Parts: steal 1 more token per corpse consumed.
SPECIAL 1: Drown in Viscera: Regurgitate has a 5+ effect chance to strip a positive token of your choice from foes in the area.
SPECIAL 2: Rapid Adaptation: May also mutate once for each corpse created with Regurgitate instead.
SPECIAL 3: Cleansing Wash: Regurgitate has a 5+ effect chance to remove a negative token from an ally caught in the area.

TRAIT 1: Warpflesh: Starts combat with 4 mutation tokens.
TRAIT 2: Large: 2x2 unit.
ABILITY 1: Sculpt Flesh: Self. Effect: Gain 1 strength, OR 1 speed, OR 1 vitality. Spare parts: Repeat this effect once for each corpse consumed.
ABILITY 2: Absorb: Melee. Effect: Deal 1 devil damage to an adjacent unit. If reduced to 0 HP, obliterates unit and homonculus gains any tokens the absorbed unit had.
ABILITY 3: Flesh Whip: Attack, Range 1-2. On hit: 1 damage and splash (target): 1 damage and create one or (5+) or two corpse tokens in an adjacent space to target.
SPECIAL 1: Ball of Limbs: When choosing to MOVE again, destroys walls and absorbs corpses it moves over, mutating each time.
SPECIAL 2: Meld: When absorbing allies does not obliterate them, and this unit mutates.
SPECIAL 3: Form Carapace: If absorb destroys a unit, gains PHYS for the rest of combat.

TRAIT 1: Warpflesh: Starts combat with 4 mutation tokens.
TRAIT 2: Mutant Heart: This unit’s HP equals the number of mutation tokens it has (max 6). When it takes damage, it discards that many mutation tokens instead. If at start or end of any turn it has 0 mutation tokens, it is slain.
ABILITY 1: Perfect Vessel: Attack, Range 1-2 On hit: 2 damage (5+) and gain 1 strength.
ABILITY 2: Ecdysis: Range 1-2 Effect: Create a wall in range. When the wall is destroyed, create four corpses in adjacent spaces, which could be placed under characters.
ABILITY 3: Necrogenesis: Self Effect: Spend 3 mutation tokens, then summon a duplicate of this character in range 1-2 without this ability. Then duplicate all tokens on this character and place them on the copy. This ability can only be used once per combat. May destroy all walls in the duplicate’s space before placing it.
SPECIAL 1: Relentless: When choosing to MOVE again, destroys all walls it moves into.
SPECIAL 2: Elongate: Perfect Vessel becomes range 2-4.
SPECIAL 3: Strengthened Heart: Necrogenesis can be used an additional time at or after round 5+.

TRAIT 1: Polyglot: At turn start, may convert a mutation token into strength, speed, or vitality. Then mutate.

SPECIAL 1: Wild Mutation (1 SOUL): Own or Allied Turn, Range 1-4. Trigger: Turn start. Effect: Unit gains 1 strength, (3-4) OR 1 speed, (5-6) OR 1 vitality. Spare Parts: May choose one token per corpse consumed instead of rolling.
SPECIAL 2: Sample Genome (3 SOUL): Own or allied turn. Range 1-4. Copy all positive tokens on unit, then grant them to another unit in range.

TRAIT 1: Endless: For every unit slot spent on Flock, you may summon an additional Flock unit in a free space adjacent to an allied unit at the end of every round.
TRAIT 2: Thrall: 2 of these units are worth 1 unit slot. Can be activated two at a time.
ABILITY 1: Bloodletting: Attack, melee. On hit: 1 damage. Rip Apart (3+): with piercing.
ABILITY 2: Call to Feast: Self. This unit gains 1 or (6+) 2 speed. It may then immediately spend two speed tokens to summon an additional Flock unit in an adjacent space.
SPECIAL 1: The Red Wet Hue: Bloodletting gains Rip Apart (5+): and deal 1 curse damage again.
SPECIAL 2: Blood Frenzy: At round 5+, become immune to graze, line, and splash damage.
SPECIAL 3: Rabid: This faction's Dive Bomb trait can be used for free on one Flock unit a round.

TRAIT 1: Feral Dodge: May spend a speed token when attacked by an ACT ability to give the attacker -1D on the attack roll and step 1 after the ability resolves
ABILITY 1: Disembowel: Attack, melee. On hit: 1 damage. Rip Apart (3+): +1 damage and gain 1 speed, Rip Apart (5+): and gain 1 strength and summon a Flock unit in a free space adjacent to the target.
ABILITY 2: Raise Roost: Range 1-3. Effect: Create a wall in range, then grant 1 speed to one (3+) or two, (5+) or all allied units adjacent to the wall.
ABILITY 3: Cannibalize: Melee. Effect: Slay an adjacent allied unit. This unit gains 1 strength, 1 speed, and may MOVE again.
SPECIAL 1: Sinew: At 1 HP or lower, this unit is immune to damage from grazes, lines, and splash effects.
SPECIAL 2: Voracious: Cannibalize can also be used on an enemy unit at 1 HP or lower, but does not grant tokens if used this way.
SPECIAL 3: The Noose: Raise Roost gains +1 range and when it creates a wall, it may first pull a unit in range 2 one space.

TRAIT 1: Flight: Ignores adverse terrain and elevation attack and movement penalties.
ABILITY 1: Paranoia: Curse, Range 1-3. Effect: Target enemy unit always counts as having +2 of your units adjacent to it, even when alone. This effect lasts until this ability is used again or the Siren is slain.
ABILITY 2: Sonic Screech: Self. Effects: Splash (self): 1 curse damage. Push all units one (5+) or two spaces.
ABILITY 3: Siren's Song: Self. Effects: Until the start of this unit's next turn, while adjacent to this unit, enemy units take -1D on attacks, and self and allies are immune to graze damage.
SPECIAL 1: Ear Splitter: Sonic Screech also grants one or two allies in the area 1 speed or strength.
SPECIAL 2: Painful Whispers: Paranoia deals 1 piercing curse damage, but only counts as +1 adjacent unit.
SPECIAL 3: Lullaby: When Siren's Song expires, adjacent allies gain 1 speed.

TRAIT 1: Long Stilts: May move through walls, but not end its turn in one. When moving through a wall, gain free movement until end of turn.
ABILITY 1: Prepare the Pole: Self. Effect: Step 2, then create a wall in a free adjacent space (4+) and gain 1 speed.
ABILITY 2: Hang for the Owls: Attack, melee. On hit: 2 damage. Rip Apart (3+): with piercing, Rip Apart (5+): then 1 damage again and summon a Flock unit adjacent to target.
SPECIAL 1: Perching: If starting turn adjacent to a wall, gain 1 speed and clear a negative token.
SPECIAL 2: Writhing: While adjacent to a wall, damage always ignores vitality and armor.
SPECIAL 3: Clinging: While adjacent to a wall, is curseproof.

TRAIT 1: Circling: Do not deploy the owl normally. Instead, it arrives at the start of round 3 but may be deployed in any free space. When it lands, it may destroy any walls under its space before being placed.
TRAIT 2: Flesh Sacrifice: The owl counts as two allied units for the purposes of Rip Apart, but not to itself.
ABILITY 1: Guzzle: Attack, melee. On hit: 2 damage. Rip Apart (3+): +1 damage. Rip Apart (5+): +1 damage, and obliterate target if it is slain.
ABILITY 2: Fleshgorger: Self. Splash (self): 1 damage. Then, for every unit slain, clear on token, and gain 1 speed or strength. Then, step 1 per unit slain, and may destroy walls during this movement.
ABILITY 3: Concussive Shriek: Range 2-4. Splash (target): Deal 1 curse damage once, to a unit in the area for each wall in the area. The same unit can be targeted more than once.
SPECIAL 1: Messy Arrival: When it first arrives, the Owl may slay all adjacent allied units, gaining 1 speed or strength for each.
SPECIAL 2: Sleek Owl: The Owl loses Large (it becomes 1x1) and gains free movement.
SPECIAL 3: Bone Resonance: Concussive Shriek also slays allied units in the area, counting each as a wall for purposes of the ability.

TRAIT 1: Longlegs: This unit also counts as wall. It blocks line of sight and can be used for cover like a wall. Effects that would destroy walls have no effect on this unit.
ABILITY 1: Flense: Attack, Melee On hit: 1 damage. Rip Apart (3+): +1 damage (5+): +1 damage. This unit may spend speed tokens as part of this ability to reduce the cost of Rip Apart by 1 per token spend.
ABILITY 2: Feeding Call: Self Effect: Until end of this unit’s next turn, after any adjacent unit is slain, summon a flock in free space in range. This effect cannot trigger more than once a turn.
ABILITY 3: Horrendous Pecking: Self Effect: Until this unit MOVEs or steps, any foe that ends a MOVE or ACT in an adjacent space takes 1 piercing damage. On slay, this unit gains 1 speed. This effect cannot trigger more than once a turn.
SPECIAL 1: Entrail Scatter: If feeding call triggers two or more times before it expires, this unit gains 2 strength.
SPECIAL 2: Jitter: Horrendous Pecking does not break if this unit moves out of its turn.
SPECIAL 3: Wolf Down: Flense ignores armor and vitality if its target has 1 HP or lower.

TRAIT 1: Flesh Sacrifice: The owl counts as two allied units for the purposes of Rip Apart, but not to itself.

TRAIT 1: Necrophage

TRAIT 1: Necrophage
